'''鈭歾h-h-m''' ('''zhahama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagitate|vagitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagitate|vagitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-h-m
|-
! Lemma
| zhahama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhahamithi|zhahamithi]] || [[word:zhahamiji|zhahamiji]] || [[word:zhahamishi|zhahamishi]] || [[word:zhahami|zhahami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahamuthuth|zhahamuthuth]] || [[word:zhahamujuj|zhahamujuj]] || [[word:zhahamushush|zhahamushush]] || [[word:zhaham|zhaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahamuthu|zhahamuthu]] || [[word:zhahamuju|zhahamuju]] || [[word:zhahamushu|zhahamushu]] || [[word:zhahamu|zhahamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahamufuth|zhahamufuth]] || [[word:zhahamufuj|zhahamufuj]] || [[word:zhahamufush|zhahamufush]] || [[word:zhahamuf|zhahamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhahamethe|zhahamethe]] || [[word:zhahameje|zhahameje]] || [[word:zhahameshe|zhahameshe]] || [[word:zhahame|zhahame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahamothoth|zhahamothoth]] || [[word:zhahamojoj|zhahamojoj]] || [[word:zhahamoshosh|zhahamoshosh]] || [[word:zhaham|zhaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahamotho|zhahamotho]] || [[word:zhahamojo|zhahamojo]] || [[word:zhahamosho|zhahamosho]] || [[word:zhahamo|zhahamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahamofoth|zhahamofoth]] || [[word:zhahamofoj|zhahamofoj]] || [[word:zhahamofosh|zhahamofosh]] || [[word:zhahamof|zhahamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhaham忙th忙|zhaham忙th忙]] || [[word:zhaham忙j忙|zhaham忙j忙]] || [[word:zhaham忙sh忙|zhaham忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhaham忙|zhaham忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahamathath|zhahamathath]] || [[word:zhahamajaj|zhahamajaj]] || [[word:zhahamashash|zhahamashash]] || [[word:zhaham|zhaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahamatha|zhahamatha]] || [[word:zhahamaja|zhahamaja]] || [[word:zhahamasha|zhahamasha]] || [[word:zhahama|zhahama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahamafath|zhahamafath]] || [[word:zhahamafaj|zhahamafaj]] || [[word:zhahamafash|zhahamafash]] || [[word:zhahamaf|zhahamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhahamasha|zhahamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhahamasha|gozhahamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhahamasha|gokizhahamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhahamn眉sha|zhahamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhahamnkn眉sha|gozhahamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhahamn眉sha|gokizhahamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhahamsh毛sha|zhahamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhahamnksh毛sha|gozhahamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhahamsh毛sha|gokizhahamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhahamrosha|zhahamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhahamnkrosha|gozhahamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhahamrosha|gokizhahamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahamusha|zhahamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhahamnkmusha|gozhahamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahamusha|gokizhahamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhahamsherasha|zhahamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhahamnksherasha|gozhahamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhahamsherasha|gokizhahamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhahamngasha|zhahamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhahamnkngasha|gozhahamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhahamngasha|gokizhahamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhahamyasha|zhahamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhahamnkyasha|gozhahamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhahamyasha|gokizhahamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhahamyamasha|zhahamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhahamnkyamasha|gozhahamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhahamyamasha|gokizhahamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhahamn眉sh毛sha|zhahamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhahamnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhahamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhahamn眉sh毛sha|gokizhahamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhahamn眉rosha|zhahamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhahamnkn眉rosha|gozhahamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhahamn眉rosha|gokizhahamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahamn眉musha|zhahamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhahamnkn眉musha|gozhahamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahamn眉musha|gokizhahamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhahamsh毛n眉sha|zhahamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhahamnksh毛n眉sha|gozhahamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhahamsh毛n眉sha|gokizhahamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhahamsh毛rosha|zhahamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhahamnksh毛rosha|gozhahamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhahamsh毛rosha|gokizhahamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahamsh毛musha|zhahamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhahamnksh毛musha|gozhahamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahamsh毛musha|gokizhahamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhahamron眉sha|zhahamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhahamnkron眉sha|gozhahamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhahamron眉sha|gokizhahamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhahamrosh毛sha|zhahamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhahamnkrosh毛sha|gozhahamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhahamrosh毛sha|gokizhahamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhahamromusha|zhahamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhahamnkromusha|gozhahamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhahamromusha|gokizhahamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhahamun眉sha|zhahamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhahamnkmun眉sha|gozhahamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhahamun眉sha|gokizhahamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhahamush毛sha|zhahamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhahamnkmush毛sha|gozhahamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhahamush毛sha|gokizhahamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhahamurosha|zhahamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhahamnkmurosha|gozhahamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhahamurosha|gokizhahamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhaham|zhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙h忙m|zh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhaham|hozhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙h忙m|hozh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhaham|hohozhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙h忙m|hohozh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhaham|n眉zhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙h忙m|n眉zh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhaham|n眉n眉zhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙h忙m|n眉n眉zh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhaham|n茂zhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙h忙m|n茂zh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhaham|n茂n茂zhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙h忙m|n茂n茂zh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhaham|luzhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙h忙m|luzh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhaham|luluzhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙h忙m|luluzh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhaham|lizhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙h忙m|lizh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhaham|lilizhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙h忙m|lilizh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhaham|kozhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙h忙m|kozh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhaham|kokozhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙h忙m|kokozh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhaham|kezhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙h忙m|kezh忙h忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhaham|kekezhaham]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙h忙m|kekezh忙h忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
